sections.paragraph:
- Original: Κλωπᾶς

- Transliteration: Klopas

- Phonetic: klo-pas'

- Definition: Cleophas = "my exchanges"

1. the father of James the less, the husband of Mary the sister of the mother of Jesus

- Origin: of Aramaic origin (corresponding to H256)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of Chaldee origin (corresponding to H256); Clopas an Israelite: - Clopas.
